trade.summary: The Regno Unito and EAU have deep trade ties rooted in historical British Trucial States relations. The Regno Unito exports financial services, defense equipment, vehicles, and luxury goods. The EAU exports crude oil and is a major transit hub for Regno Unito exports to Asia. A bilateral trade agreement is in negotiation post-Brexit.

diplomatic.summary: The EAU-Regno Unito Comprehensive Strategic Partnership (signed 2021) reflects one of the strongest Arab-Western bilateral relationships. Historical ties dating to the British Trucial States are reinforced by deep people-to-people links (largest expat community in Dubai), intelligence sharing, and security cooperation. The Regno Unito is among the EAU's most trusted Western partners.

military.summary: The Regno Unito maintains a permanent military presence in the EAU including a naval support facility in Fujairah and air force elements. Regno Unito-EAU conduct regular joint exercises. The Regno Unito has sold Typhoon jets, Hawk trainers, and naval vessels to the EAU. The British military trained EAU forces for decades.

financial.summary: London is the preferred global financial hub for EAU sovereign wealth and private capital. ADIA and Mubadala have billions in Regno Unito assets. EAU investors are among the largest owners of Regno Unito property, infrastructure (Thames Water, Heathrow), and Premier League football clubs (Man City via Abu Dhabi). Regno Unito financial institutions dominate EAU banking.

energy.summary: The Regno Unito imports EAU crude oil. BP has equity stakes in ADNOC upstream projects. As the Regno Unito phases out North Sea production, Gulf imports become more significant. Regno Unito energy companies are active in EAU renewable and conventional energy sectors.

scientific.summary: Strong scientific and educational ties: UCL, Heriot-Watt, and other Regno Unito universities have EAU campuses. Regno Unito-EAU collaboration spans AI, healthcare, space, and sustainability. The two governments co-fund research through dedicated science and innovation programs.
